Flight Commander '''Drolan''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] assigned to the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].

During an [[attack on the first Death Star]], Drolan assumed command of the four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] on training maneuvers near the Death Star.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}} {{Voice}}
